title: New Storage Solutions from Creative Options
excerpt: Once again I've partnered with Creative Options to help me get organized for Spring! I love that their new products, which debuted at CHA come in fresh new colors and patterns. In the photo above, I am carrying the Medium…
body:
Once again I've partnered with Creative Options to help me get organized for Spring! I love that their new products, which debuted at CHA come in fresh new colors and patterns. In the photo above, I am carrying the Medium Grab N Go in light blue. It's the perfect size for carrying all sorts of supplies. To see what I store in the latest styles, check out this video. You'll see that Creative Options has fashionable and functional storage solutions for crafts of all kinds!

The products featured in the video can be found at Hobby Lobby stores.
For crafting tips, giveaways, and product news, 'Like' Creative Options on Facebook. 

I also asked the first person who comes to mind when I think of "the coolest knitter I know", Jen, of HEYJENRENEE to check out the products, and here is her awesome post about the same storage cases you see in the video. Hope you feel inspired to get organized!
